allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\);const files=[''src/utils/smartChunker.ts'',''src/utils/languageDetect.ts'',''src/utils/queryDecomposer.ts'',''src/utils/languageHints.ts''];for\(const f of files\){let t=fs.readFileSync\(f,''utf8''\);const orig=t;t=t.replace\(/[\\u2018\\u2019]/g,String.fromCharCode\(39\)\).replace\(/[\\u201c\\u201d]/g,String.fromCharCode\(34\)\).replace\(/\\u2192/g,''->''\).replace\(/\\u2014/g,''--''\);if\(t!==orig\){fs.writeFileSync\(f,t,''utf8''\);console.log\(''fixed:'',f\)}else{console.log\(''ok:'',f\)}}")
